title: delphinium orientale subsp. hispanicum
intro: Delphinium orientale subsp. hispanicum, also known as the Spanish Delphinium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae), native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Delphinium orientale subsp. hispanicum are said to include relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as alleviation of pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made in the form of infusions or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
